---
name: Request an update to an existing entry
about: An existing entry is outdated, incomplete, or has a broken cross-link. Suggest an update.
title: "[update] "
labels: "update-entry"
---

## Entry affected

**Path:** <!-- e.g. `content/android/01-apk-structure.md` -->

**URL:** <!-- e.g. https://heretek-ai.github.io/RE-Library/android/01-apk-structure/ -->

## What's outdated or missing

<!-- Quote the relevant section(s) of the entry and explain what needs to
change. Be specific: "the ptrace example no longer compiles against
glibc 2.38" is more useful than "the anti-debug entry is stale". -->

## Source for the update

<!-- If you have a citation (man page, CVE, RFC, changelog), link it.
"Trust me bro" updates will be slow to land. -->

## Severity

<!-- One of: typo / minor (cosmetic), stale-but-correct (works, just
old), incorrect (claim is wrong), missing-critical-topic (an
important sub-topic isn't covered) -->

## Suggested fix

<!-- If you have one. PRs are welcome — link a branch or a gist. -->
